tenantId.title: Tenant ID
tenantId.description: The Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID (also called Directory ID). Found in the Azure portal under Azure Active Directory > Properties. Supports EL

audience.title: Audience
audience.description: Expected audience (aud claim) for incoming access tokens. In Entra ID this is the Application ID URI (e.g. api://{clientId}) or the client ID of your resource application. Validating the audience prevents token confusion attacks. Supports EL

userClaim.title: User claim
userClaim.description: Claim field used to identify the end user in analytics logs. Use 'oid' (Object ID, default) for a stable tenant-wide identifier, or 'sub' for a per-application identifier. Supports EL

scopeSeparator.title: Scope separator
scopeSeparator.description: Separator used between scopes (default is a whitespace)
